references.text: Holttum, RE & E Hennipman. 1978. Lomariopsis group. Flora Malesiana series 2, 1: 255-330
Holttum, RE. 1966. The genera Lomariopsis, Teratophyllum, and Lomagramma in the islands of the Pacific and Australia. Blumea 14: 215-223
Holttum, RE. 1991. Tectaria group. Flora Malesiana series 2, 2: 1-132

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 7 May 2026

species.citation: (Fée) C.Chr. , Index Filic. (C.Chr), Suppl. Tert. (1934) 64 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 2 (1991) 117; ≡ Hemicardion crenatum Fée , Mém. Foug., 5. Gen. Filic. (1850) 283. = Cyclopeltis zamboangana Copel. , PJS 81 (1952) 21.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, Java, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BOHOL, BUCAS GRANDE (photos), LUZON: Apayao (photos), Bataan, Batangas, Cagayan, Isabela (photos), Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, MINDANAO: Misamis Oriental (photos), Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, POLILLO, SAMAR.

species.citation: (J.Sm.) Berk. , Introd. Crypt. Bot. (1857) 517 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 2 (1991) 118; ≡ Lastrea presliana J.Sm. , J. Bot. (Hooker) 3 (1841) 412. = Cyclopeltis cumingiana (Fée) C.V.Morton , Contr. U.S. Natl. Herb. 38 (1967) 46; ≡ Hemicardion cumingianum Fée , Mém. Foug., 5. Gen. Filic. (1850) 283.
species.distribution: Borneo, Moluccas, ?Myanmar, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sulawesi. BOHOL, CATANDUANES, DINAGAT, GENERAL ISLAND, GUIMARAS, LEYTE, LUZON: Batangas, Cagayan, Camarines Sur, Cavite, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Surigao del Norte, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SAMAR, SAN MIGUEL, TICAO.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 3 May 2026

species.citation: (Copel.) Holttum , Bot. Mag. (Tokyo) 47 (1933) 273 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1978) 261; ≡ Stenochlaena kingii Copel. , PJS 6c (1911) 80.
species.distribution: Australia, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Bataan, Laguna, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN.

species.citation: (C.Presl) Holttum , Novit. Bot. Inst. Horto Bot. Univ. Carol. 1968 (1969) 9 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1978) 262; ≡ Olfersia lineata C.Presl , Tent. Pterid. (1836) 235. = Lomariopsis smithii Fée , Mém. Foug., 2. Hist. Acrostich. (1845) 71. = Lomariopsis papyracea Copel. , PJS 56 (1935) 104.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, China, Java, ?Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BILIRAN, BOHOL, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Batangas, Cagayan, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao del Norte, Zamboanga del Sur, NEGROS, PALAWAN, SAMAR.

species.citation: (Copel.) Holttum , Bot. Mag. (Tokyo) 47 (1933) 274 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1978) 261; ≡ Stenochlaena subtrifoliata Copel. , PJS 1(Suppl.) (1906) 152.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BILIRAN, LEYTE, LUZON: Camarines Norte, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: South Cotabato, Surigao del Sur (photos), Zamboanga del Sur, SAMAR.

species.citation: (Kunze) Mett. , Fil. Hort. Bot. Lips. (1856) 22 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1978) 262; ≡ Lomaria spectabilis Kunze , Bot. Zeitung (Berlin) 6 (1848) 144.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, ?Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Vietnam. LUZON: Camarines Sur (photos).
species.notes: Philippine specimens formerly so-named to this species all appear to have narrower fertile pinnae and hence believed by Holttum to be L. kingii. (Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1978) 262).
